strategy: Almost every spell you cast makes Lucia interrupt-heal all allies to full, and the heal ignores Doom and Gloom and infections, so plan to kill her in a single hit rather than chip her.
Set up with the exempt spell types: harmful Charms (weaknesses on her) and Minion spells do not trigger the heal.
Do not join late (a 500-pierce Mana Burn), and do not out-number her team early; if wizards outnumber enemies she summons Clockworkers to even it.
Every 5th round she steals all your helpful Charms and Wards, so blade in the same round you hit, never before.
Watch her 4-round cycle (self-heal, Magnify, team buff charms, then an all-enemy Mockenspiel for ~2,600-3,000) and heal through it.
Hit her with a single Myth burst (she takes +30% from Myth) big enough to kill through her full-heal in one shot.
cheatNotes: Joining after round 1 makes her Mana Burn you for 500 damage that pierces all resist (about 1,585 after her boost).
Most spells you cast make her interrupt-cast a Blessing that heals every ally to full.
That heal cannot be weakened by harmful Charms, Wards, or Globals, so healing debuffs will not stop it.
The exceptions that do not trigger the heal are harmful Charms and Minion spells; use weaknesses and minions to set up safely.
At the start of any round where wizards outnumber enemies, she summons a Clockworker until the teams are even.
Summoning your own minion does not trigger her Clockworker cheat.
At the start of every 5th round she steals all helpful Charms and all helpful Wards from every wizard.
Cycle step 1: she self-casts a Sprite for a small heal plus a HoT over 3 rounds.
Cycle step 2: she casts Magnify on herself.
Cycle step 3: she buffs all allies with a +30% Blade, +20% Accuracy, +10% Spear, and +30% Healing Charm.
Cycle step 4: she casts an all-enemies Mockenspiel dealing roughly 2,600-3,000 Balance to the team, then the cycle resets.
